biblioview 0.4.0
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with biblioview

    Format DOI and URL Columns into Clickable HTML Anchors

    format_hyperlinks.Rd

    Scans a data frame for columns matching "doi" or "url" (case-insensitive) and transforms their string values into active HTML anchor tags (<a href="...">). It automatically protects existing full URLs inside the DOI column from being duplicated with the DOI resolver prefix.

    Usage

    format_hyperlinks(df)

    Arguments

    df

    A data frame containing bibliographic data, typically generated by fetch_all_zotero_data().

    Value

    A data frame with the matched identifier columns transformed into HTML link strings.

    Examples

    if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Assuming raw_data contains columns named 'DOI' and 'url'
clean_df <- format_hyperlinks(raw_data)
} # }
